activeGoal: 移除 sidepanel 中遮挡主内容的非功能性语义版块与装饰性状态区，例如“生成回答”“结果阅读”等额外语义包装/摘要卡片，仅保留完成任务所需的真实功能内容与必要状态提示，保证界面更简洁不遮挡。

tasks.title: 移除 sidepanel 中遮挡主内容的非功能性语义版块与装饰性状态区，例如“生成回答”“结果阅读”等额外语义包装/摘要卡片，仅保留完成任务所需的真实功能内容与必要状态提示，保证界面更简洁不遮挡。
tasks.summary: Fast-track localized UI cleanup completed. Removed heavy non-functional stage/status wrapper blocks such as the stage banner and structured reading panel, replaced them with minimal inline status hints when needed, kept core chat/streaming/question/retry/error behaviors intact, updated timeline ordering to preserve earlier same-session answers, and refreshed sidepanel tests for the lighter presentation.
